    Index

    A C E G H I M N P R S 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    A

    App - Class in sudoku.cli
    Entry point for the Sudoku command-line interface.
    App() - Constructor for class sudoku.cli.App
     

    C

    clearCell(int, int) - Method in interface sudoku.cli.IController
    Clears the target cell of the value which it currently stores.
    ControllerException - Exception Class in sudoku.cli.exceptions
    Base type for checked exceptions thrown by sudoku.cli.IController operations, representing recoverable error conditions that arise from invalid user actions.
    ControllerException(String) - Constructor for exception class sudoku.cli.exceptions.ControllerException
    Constructs a new ControllerException with the given detail message.

    E

    EmptyCellException - Exception Class in sudoku.cli.exceptions
    Thrown when an operation attempts to clear a cell that is already empty.
    EmptyCellException(int, int) - Constructor for exception class sudoku.cli.exceptions.EmptyCellException
    Constructs a new EmptyCellException for the given cell.
    EmptyGridException - Exception Class in sudoku.cli.exceptions
    Thrown when an operation requires a non-empty grid, but the Sudoku grid is already empty.
    EmptyGridException() - Constructor for exception class sudoku.cli.exceptions.EmptyGridException
    Constructs a new EmptyGridException.

    G

    getGridState() - Method in interface sudoku.cli.IController
    Returns the current state of the Sudoku grid
    GivenCellException - Exception Class in sudoku.cli.exceptions
    Thrown when an operation attempts to modify a cell that stores a given/hinted value.
    GivenCellException(int, int) - Constructor for exception class sudoku.cli.exceptions.GivenCellException
    Constructs a new GivenCellException for the given cell.
    GridSolvedException - Exception Class in sudoku.cli.exceptions
    Thrown when an operation requires unsolved cells, but the Sudoku grid has already been solved.
    GridSolvedException() - Constructor for exception class sudoku.cli.exceptions.GridSolvedException
    Constructs a new GridSolvedException.

    H

    hint() - Method in interface sudoku.cli.IController
    Generates a new given cell in a random place on the Sudoku grid.

    I

    IController - Interface in sudoku.cli
    Outlines the controller layer of the game, which wraps the sudoku package, facilitating all communication between the model and view layers of the MVC stack of the game.
    InvalidCellException - Exception Class in sudoku.cli.exceptions
    Thrown when a requested cell coordinate does not exist within the bounds of the Sudoku grid.
    InvalidCellException(int, int) - Constructor for exception class sudoku.cli.exceptions.InvalidCellException
    Constructs a new InvalidCellException for the given out-of-bounds cell.
    InvalidValueException - Exception Class in sudoku.cli.exceptions
    Thrown when a requested value to place in a cell exceeds the size of the Sudoku grid.
    InvalidValueException(int, int) - Constructor for exception class sudoku.cli.exceptions.InvalidValueException
    Constructs a new InvalidValueException for the given out-of-range value.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class sudoku.cli.App
    Launches the Sudoku CLI.

    N

    newGame(ISudokuGenerator.PuzzleDifficulty) - Method in interface sudoku.cli.IController
    Generates a new sudoku grid, starting with the given difficulty.

    P

    placeValue(int, int, int) - Method in interface sudoku.cli.IController
    Attempts to place a given value in the target cell.

    R

    reset() - Method in interface sudoku.cli.IController
    Resets the grid to an empty state.

    S

    solve() - Method in interface sudoku.cli.IController
    Completes the grid by filling in any blank cells, and replacing any that are incorrect.
    sudoku.cli - package sudoku.cli
     
    sudoku.cli.exceptions - package sudoku.cli.exceptions
